race.name: L'Étape Ciudad de México by Tour de France
race.tagline: Experience the Tour de France in the heart of Mexico City

climate.description: Mild late fall weather with cool mornings and comfortable riding temperatures. Low precipitation risk.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 70. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 66.

course_description.character: Starts Avenida Reforma beneath **Angel de la Independencia**, Mexico City's Champs-Élysées. Passes **Ciudad Universitaria**, **Torres de Satélite**, **World Trade Center**. Finishes near **Campo Marte** flag monument. Urban parcours with cultural landmarks as suffering zones rather than steep climbs.
suffering_zones: Iconic avenue with steady rollers under Mexico City skyline
University campus undulations with crowd energy

logistics.transport: Mexico City international airport (MEX) 30-45min to city center. Metro and rideshare excellent. Event on closed major avenues.

history.origin_story: 8th edition confirmed. Established L'Étape Series event in Tour de France amateur calendar. November 30, 2026 edition[1][7].

biased_opinion.summary: Tour de France branding in Reforma Avenue with Angel de la Independencia start is pure magic. Urban sportive perfection.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier urban sportive with Tour de France pedigree. Perfect for prestige seekers who want city spectacle over mountain suffering.

youtube_data.search_query: L'Étape Ciudad de México by Tour de France gran fondo cycling Mexico City

videos.title: L´Étape Ciudad de México 2021 - Highlights | L'Etape by Tour de France
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
L'Etape Ciudad de México came back for another year through the Mexican Capital alongside Oscar Pereiro!

---------

L'Etape by Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France series”, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 20 international locations including:
🇫🇷 France
🇧🇷 Brasil
🇲🇽 México
🇨🇴 Colombia
🇨🇳 China
🇦🇺 Australia
🇹🇭 Thailand
🇨🇭 Switzerland
🇮🇩 Indonesia
🇪🇸 Spain
🇲🇾 Malaysia
🇸🇰 Slovakia
🇨🇿 Czech Republic
🇷🇺 Russia
🇬🇧 UK
🇨🇦 Canada
🇺🇸 USA
🇳🇱 Netherlands
🇨🇾 Cyprus
🇸🇮 Slovenia
🇪🇨 Ecuador

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapebytourdefrance.com/ for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/letapebytourdefrance
-Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/letapebytourdefrance/
-Strava 👉 https://www.strava.com/clubs/letapebyletourdefrance

L'Etape by Le Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience Le Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Le Tour de France series”, said Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. The series has now expanded to 14 international locations including Colombia, Wales, Mexico, China, and Australia.

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.
